ddls:
CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the playlist */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant keywords or tags associated with the playlist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the playlist's cover image */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of users following the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the track */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood or atmosphere of the track */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track's musical scale */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist is associated with */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track within a playlist */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "time_added" TEXT /* Time when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "hour_added" INTEGER /* Hour (0-23) when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the track within the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., listener, curator, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the popularity score was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_popularity_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of audio features */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track's musical scale */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, skip, like) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "recommended_track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended track */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained within the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time series record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "data_points" TEXT /* Data points for the track's popularity and other metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., view, share, comment) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_engagement_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track version */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_versions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of audio feature */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, deletion) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, deletion) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_history_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started following the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity record */,
  "track_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first track */,
  "track_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second track */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the two tracks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_similarity_track_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("track_id1") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_similarity_track_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("track_id2") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
